meta.title: Car Rental Fort Lauderdale & Miami | Rent With Heldy
meta.description: Family-owned car rental in Fort Lauderdale, Miami, and South Florida. 1,400+ five-star reviews, contactless pickup, hotel and airport delivery. Book online in minutes.

hero.imageAlt: Sunset drive along a South Florida causeway toward the Miami skyline
hero.title: Skip the rental counter.
hero.descriptionLine1: Your car, delivered when, where, and how you need it.
hero.descriptionLine2: A family-owned South Florida fleet delivering clean, reliable vehicles with personal service every step of the way.
hero.reassurance: Answer a few quick questions and we'll help you find the right car and delivery option.

trust.language: Message Us in Your Preferred Language

trustStrip.language: Message Us in Your Preferred Language

destinations.title: Where should we deliver your vehicle?
destinations.description: Tell us where you'll be — an airport, a hotel, a cruise terminal, or the body shop — and we'll bring the keys to you.

airport.title: Airport
airport.description: Flying into FLL or Miami? We'll coordinate the most convenient pickup based on your arrival, so you can skip the rental counter and start your trip.
airport.alt: An SUV on a South Florida causeway with a plane descending toward the Miami skyline at sunset

hotel.title: Hotel
hotel.description: Staying nearby? We can deliver directly to your hotel, resort, or vacation rental across South Florida. Delivery fees vary by location.
hotel.alt: An SUV parked under a hotel porte-cochère at dusk with the Miami skyline across the water

cruise.title: Cruise Port
cruise.description: Heading to PortMiami or Port Everglades? Start or finish your cruise with a rental coordinated around your ship and schedule.
cruise.alt: An SUV on a causeway passing a docked cruise ship near the Miami skyline at sunset

bodyShop.title: Body Shop
bodyShop.description: Car in the shop? We'll help keep you moving with a replacement rental delivered to your repair facility.
bodyShop.alt: An SUV parked outside a body shop with palm trees and the skyline visible at dusk

why.title: Big rental brands make you come to them. We come to you.
why.description: Enterprise, Hertz, and the airport counters mean lines, shuttle buses, and fine print. A peer-to-peer app means a different stranger every time. We're the middle ground travelers actually want: a real, local, family-run fleet that shows up where you are.

delivered.title: Delivered, not a counter
delivered.body: We bring the car to your terminal, hotel, or door. No lines, no shuttle bus, no rental desk.

localOwner.title: A real local owner
localOwner.body: Text or call one number and reach the people who run the fleet — not an overseas call center.

familyBilingual.title: Family-owned & personal
familyBilingual.body: A South Florida family business that treats you like a guest. Message us in your preferred language.

flexible.title: Contactless & convenient
flexible.body: Contactless pickup is available on every rental with secure lockbox access — pick up on your schedule.

howItWorks.title: From search to keys in four simple steps.
howItWorks.description: No counter, no surprises — just a quick, friendly handoff wherever works best for you.

fleet.title: Clean, reliable cars for every South Florida plan.
fleet.description: A peek at our most-booked rides — practical economy options and newer premium ones, all carefully maintained. See live availability and the full fleet anytime.
fleet.tripPlannerPrompt: Still deciding? We'll match you with the right ride.

reviews.title: 1,400+ five-star reviews from Turo guests across South Florida.
reviews.description: The reason we earned All-Star Host status — clean cars, clear communication, and an easy handoff, trip after trip.
reviews.altPattern: Five-star Turo review from {{name}} for the {{vehicle}}

faqPreview.title: Questions, answered.
faqPreview.description: A few of the things guests ask us most. More on the full FAQ.

contactClose.title: Tell us about your trip.
contactClose.description: Share a few details and a member of our team will reach out as soon as possible. Prefer to talk? Reach a real person below.
contactClose.phoneLabel: Call or text, 7 days a week
contactClose.emailLabel: We'll reply as soon as possible
